name: Rosseti Kuban PJSC
summary: Rosseti Kuban PJSC, a power grid company, provides electricity transmission and distribution services in Russia. It operates approximately 91.644 thousand kilometers of electricity transmission lines. The company serves 6 million people in the Krasnodar region and the Republic of Adygea. It is also involved in the organization of recreation and health improvement facilities for children and adults; and arrangement and holding of seminars and conferences. In addition, the company designs, installs, and commissions metering units for electricity, gas, and technological equipment; and supplies hot and cold water. The company was formerly known as Kuban power and electrification public joint stock company and changed its name to Rosseti Kuban PJSC in October 2020. The company is based in Krasnodar, Russia. Rosseti Kuban PJSC is a subsidiary of PJSC Rosseti.
